chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-262 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 08.04.2022 Mr. Sahib Khan Panhwar, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh. == The petitioner by way of instant petition is intending to protect his possession, if any, over pond situated by the side of his village under the garb of harassment with direction to police to record his F.I.R against the private respondents. The dispute over the possession of pond, if any, involving factual controversy could not be resolved by this Court under the garb of harassment by directing the police to record F.I.R of the petitioner; consequently the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
